name: Embedded Systems & IoT
student_summary: Program the tiny computers inside cars, appliances and smart devices.
overview: Program the tiny computers inside cars, appliances and smart devices. Embedded Systems & IoT sits in the Emerging Tech family of Technology & Computing. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.

faqs: What does Embedded Systems & IoT pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹30 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Physics, Mathematics. Typical degrees: B.Tech ECE/EEE, B.Tech CSE. Alternatives exist: bootcamps + a strong project portfolio.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Embedded Systems & IoT evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Embedded Systems & IoT is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
